intro.title: Meet Your Mind
intro.description: Learn to distance yourself from overwhelming thoughts by giving your inner voice a name.
benefits: Reduce the power of harsh thoughts

complete.title: Activity Complete
complete.message: You've successfully named your mind and created some space between yourself and your thoughts.
complete.footer: Remember: You don't have to believe every thought your mind gives you.

concept.title: A small shift
concept.desc: When a thought shows up, it often feels like it's <0>you</0>. But what if you could step back and <1>notice</1> it instead?

input_thought.title: Let's start with a real thought
input_thought.desc: What is one thought that has been bothering you lately?
input_thought.placeholder: Write it exactly as it comes to you…

input_name.title: Create some distance
input_name.desc: Give your mind a name to help separate yourself from these thoughts.

practice.title: Try this shift
practice.guide: Gently repeat this sentence to yourself 4–5 times at your own pace.

reflection.title: What did you notice?
reflection.desc: How did the thought feel after giving it a name?
options: The thought felt a little less intense than before
I felt like I had some distance from the thought
It still felt just as strong as before
I'm not sure what changed, if anything

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
common.instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath
